classification.reason: milk-free claim found on packaging photo

ingredients.rawText: Ingredienti: zucchero, nocciole 18%, olio di semi di girasole, cacao magro in polvere 9%, burro di cacao, emulsionante: lecitine (soia), aroma. Puo contenere tracce di altra frutta a guscio.

notes: Displayed severity in the app was CONTAINS, but the packaging states senza latte and the ingredient list shows no direct milk ingredients.
Front packaging also states senza glutine and senza olio di palma.
